title: Pipeline Visualization UI for Directives
description: Visual pipeline stepper showing all directive steps, current position, artifact details, and initiative sub-progress. Available in both dashboard and game drawer UI. Server reads checkpoint files to derive pipeline step data.

in: PipelineStep types on server and frontend
Server checkpoint reading and merging into DirectiveState
Expandable artifact details on completed steps
Game drawer UI with pipeline stepper
out: Modifying pipeline skill docs to write more data

dod.criterion: PipelineStep interface exists in both server and frontend types
Server reads checkpoint files and merges pipeline steps into DirectiveState
Dashboard shows horizontal pipeline stepper above initiative list
Clicking completed steps expands artifact details
Game UI has a drawer with pipeline stepper accessible from HUD
Graceful fallback when pipelineSteps is missing
TypeScript compiles without errors

tasks.title: Extend DirectiveState types with pipeline steps and artifacts

dod.criterion: PipelineStep interface exists in both server/types.ts and src/stores/types.ts
DirectiveState has pipelineSteps and currentStepId fields
Existing DirectiveState fields remain unchanged
TypeScript compiles without errors

tasks.title: Server reads checkpoint files, maps to PipelineStep[]

dod.criterion: DirectiveWatcher reads checkpoint files from .context/directives/checkpoints/
Pipeline steps derived from checkpoint current_step with weight-aware step list
Artifact summaries extracted from checkpoint data
Checkpoint watcher triggers re-read on file changes

tasks.title: Build pipeline stepper component for dashboard

dod.criterion: PipelineStepper.tsx renders pipeline steps as horizontal dots with labels
Completed=filled, active=pulsing, pending=hollow dots
DirectiveProgress.tsx renders PipelineStepper above initiative list
Graceful fallback when pipelineSteps is missing

tasks.title: Add expandable artifact details to pipeline stepper

dod.criterion: Clicking a completed step expands its artifact details inline
Artifact details show as key-value pairs
Steps without artifacts are not clickable
Collapse/expand is smooth

tasks.title: Pipeline stepper in drawer UI accessible from game

dod.criterion: Game HUD has a button that opens a drawer/sheet overlay
Drawer shows PipelineStepper with full labels and artifact expansion
Initiative list with phase badges shown below stepper
Drawer does not interfere with game controls when closed
